task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates a bash script at the specified Desktop path with VLC commands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation or editing of '/home/ga/Desktop/launch_signage.sh'. The content should include a 'vlc' command referencing the corporate_broll.mp4 video, along with flags for looping, fullscreen, and overlays (e.g., --sub-filter, logo, marq).

task_completion.description: Verify VLC is launched in fullscreen mode with no visible user interface elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The video playback occupies the entire screen. There are no window borders, title bars, menu bars, or playback controls (play/pause buttons, timeline) visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the corporate logo is overlaid in the top-left corner of the video.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blue square logo with white text is clearly visible in the top-left corner of the playing video.

task_completion.description: Verify the yellow scrolling marquee text is overlaid at the bottom of the video.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Yellow text (representing the ticker text) is visible at the bottom of the playing video, formatted as a scrolling marquee.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saves a screenshot of the active signage to the specified Documents path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using 'scrot', 'import', or 'gnome-screenshot') or a GUI screenshot tool saving an image to '/home/ga/Documents/signage_proof.png'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually creates and saves the script file rather than just running a one-off terminal command.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the file existing on the Desktop (e.g., an icon on the desktop GUI or an 'ls' command showing launch_signage.sh) and being made executable (e.g., 'chmod +x').

integrity.description: Ensure the video and overlays are rendered by VLC and not mocked up in an image editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should show actual video playback characteristics. Terminal logs or taskbar icons (if visible before going fullscreen) should indicate VLC is the active application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent captures a real screenshot of the screen rather than copying or renaming an existing image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of a screenshot utility command in the terminal or the use of a GUI screenshot tool while the VLC video is playing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source video is located at /home/ga/Videos/corporate_broll.mp4. The logo image is a blue square with white text located at /home/ga/Pictures/corp_logo.png. The ticker text is read from /home/ga/Documents/ticker_text.txt. The script must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/launch_signage.sh. The final screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/signage_proof.png. The marquee text must be yellow (Hex 0xFFFF00).
